required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to calculate moving averages for

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for moving calculations (default: 7)

optional_params.name: method
optional_params.description: Moving average method: 'simple', 'weighted', 'exponential' (default: 'simple')

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations in window required to have a value (default: 1)

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output columns (default: '_ma')

outputs.description: Function that calculates moving averages in a MovingAggrPipe.

moving_average.description:
Calculate moving averages for specified columns

Parameters:
-----------
columns : str or List[str]
    Column(s) to calculate moving averages for
window : int, default=7
    Window size for moving calculations
method : str, default='simple'
    Moving average method: 'simple', 'weighted', 'exponential'
min_periods : int, default=1
    Minimum number of observations in window required to have a value
center : bool, default=False
    Set the labels at the center of the window
time_column : str, optional
    Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows
group_columns : List[str], optional
    Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data)
output_suffix : str, default='_ma'
    Suffix for output columns

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that calculates moving averages in a MovingAggrPipe

required_params.name: numerator_column
required_params.description: Column to use as numerator

required_params.name: denominator_column
required_params.description: Column to use as denominator

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for moving calculations (default: 7)

optional_params.description: Set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: fill_zeroes
optional_params.description: Replace division by zero with 0 instead of NaN (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: output_column
optional_params.description: Name for the output column (if None, uses '{numerator_column}_to_{denominator_column}_ratio') (optional)

outputs.description: Function that calculates moving ratios in a MovingAggrPipe.

moving_ratio.description:

-----------

fill_zeroes : bool, default=False
    Replace division by zero with 0 instead of NaN
time_column : str, optional
    Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows
group_columns : List[str], optional
    Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data)
output_column : str, optional
    Name for the output column (if None, uses '{numerator_column}_to_{denominator_column}_ratio')

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that calculates moving ratios in a MovingAggrPipe

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to detect turning points for

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for peak/trough detection (points must be highest/lowest in window) (default: 7)

optional_params.name: threshold
optional_params.description: Minimum absolute percentage change required to consider a point a turning point (default: 0.0)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations in window required to consider a turning point (default: 3)

optional_params.name: peak_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for peak indicator columns (default: '_peak')

optional_params.name: trough_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for trough indicator columns (default: '_trough')

outputs.description: Function that detects turning points in a MovingAggrPipe.

detect_turning_points.description:
Detect peaks and troughs (turning points) in time series data

Parameters:
-----------
columns : str or List[str]
    Column(s) to detect turning points for
window : int, default=7
    Window size for peak/trough detection (points must be highest/lowest in window)
threshold : float, default=0.0
    Minimum absolute percentage change required to consider a point a turning point
time_column : str, optional
    Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows
group_columns : List[str], optional
    Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data)
min_periods : int, default=3
    Minimum number of observations in window required to consider a turning point
peak_suffix : str, default='_peak'
    Suffix for peak indicator columns
trough_suffix : str, default='_trough'
    Suffix for trough indicator columns

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that detects turning points in a MovingAggrPipe

time_column : str, optional

group_columns : List[str], optional
    Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data)
output_suffix : str, optional
    Suffix for output columns. If None, defaults to '_cum{operation}'

    Function that calculates moving cumulative metrics in a MovingAggrPipe

Calculate metrics using an expanding window (all prior data)
